test_results.test_name: Verify PHI field 'dob' is encrypted at rest
test_results.expected: Field 'dob' should use encrypted type or encryptAtRest() wrapper
test_results.remediation: Change schema to use encrypted field type or wrap with phi-crypto.encryptAtRest()

test_results.expected: Route should call audit.log() with action='CREATE'
test_results.actual: No audit.log() call found in route handler
test_results.remediation: Add audit.log({ actor: req.user.id, action: 'CREATE', resource: `Patient:${patient.id}`, outcome: 'SUCCESS' })

test_results.expected: Route should call audit.log() with action='READ'
test_results.actual: No audit.log() call found in route handler
test_results.remediation: Add audit.log({ actor: req.user.id, action: 'READ', resource: `Patient:${id}`, outcome: 'SUCCESS' })

test_results.expected: Route should call audit.log() with action='LIST'
test_results.actual: No audit.log() call found in route handler
test_results.remediation: Add audit.log({ actor: req.user.id, action: 'LIST', resource: 'Patient', outcome: 'SUCCESS', metadata: { count: patients.length } })

test_results.expected: Route should call audit.log() with action='UPDATE'
test_results.actual: No audit.log() call found in route handler
test_results.remediation: Add audit.log({ actor: req.user.id, action: 'UPDATE', resource: `Patient:${id}`, outcome: 'SUCCESS' })

test_results.expected: Route should call audit.log() with action='DELETE'
test_results.actual: No audit.log() call found in route handler
test_results.remediation: Add audit.log({ actor: req.user.id, action: 'DELETE', resource: `Patient:${id}`, outcome: 'SUCCESS' })

test_results.test_name: Verify MFA is required after JWT verification
test_results.expected: Middleware should verify MFA token after JWT validation
test_results.actual: Only JWT verification present, no MFA check
test_results.remediation: Add MFA verification step: verify TOTP/WebAuthn token before calling next()
Add middleware to verify req.protocol === 'https' or req.headers['x-forwarded-proto'] === 'https'

test_results.expected: DELETE operation should use soft-delete with tombstone
test_results.remediation: Replace with soft-delete: prisma.patient.update({ where: { id }, data: { deletedAt: new Date(), deletedBy: req.user.id } })

summary.recommendation: BLOCK PR - All blocking violations must be remediated before merge
